## Susquehanna raises price target on Applied Materials

A sell-side target raise on AMAT during a memory sector-wide drawdown is a contrarian signal worth noting — semiconductor equipment upgrades tend to lead broader semi recoveries, and analyst conviction on AMAT specifically may reflect an early-cycle positioning thesis ahead of memory capex normalization.

- Susquehanna increased its price target on AMAT
- No new target level or underlying rationale is provided in the headline
- Positive sell-side signal on semiconductor equipment cycle trajectory
- Move occurs against a backdrop of sector-wide memory bear market pressure
- Medium confidence; incremental positive data point, not a fundamental catalyst
